message:
type: CLAIM
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: Adding get_image_mimetype() lazy accessor method to ImageBlock class

type: CLAIM
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: Extracting normalize_image_bytes helper to unify image normalization/base64 logic in types.py

type: INTENT
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: Will add ImageBlock.get_image_mimetype() method that lazily computes+caches image_mimetype via filetype.guess(self.image); will keep image_to_base64 model_validator delegating mimetype logic to this new method instead of inline guess - let me know if this conflicts with your normalize_image_bytes helper extraction

type: STATUS
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: Adding module-level normalize_image_bytes(image: bytes) -> tuple[bytes, bytes] (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing); image_to_base64 validator will call it, then do 'guess = filetype.guess(decoded_for_guessing); self.image_mimetype = guess.mime if guess else None' then 'self.image = encoded_image'. If your get_image_mimetype() needs raw bytes for filetype.guess, have it accept a bytes param or call normalize_image_bytes internally rather than assuming self.image is raw - self.image will be base64 post-validator. Proceeding now to avoid blocking; will share final diff.

type: STATUS
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: Done: added ImageBlock.get_image_mimetype() called from image_to_base64 before b64encode (guesses from raw bytes, caches to self.image_mimetype); tests pass, patch written to my own patch.txt. Not modifying normalize_image_bytes/your helper - go ahead with your refactor.

type: STATUS
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: Done: added module-level normalize_image_bytes(image) -> (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing) and refactored image_to_base64 to use it; handles pre-encoded base64 vs raw bytes without double-encoding; tests pass; patch written to patch.txt
